name: P Benowitz
registry_source: NY DOS (opengovny.com) DOS ID 336822 - Penny Transportation Inc.
notes: Input 'P Benowitz' resolves to Phillip/Philip Benowitz, who owns Penny Transportation Inc. (USDOT 3589863) at the exact input address (3100 Cropsey Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11224). Affiliated entities at same address include B & F Skilled Inc. (Cheryl Benowitz) and Smart Pick Inc. (Seth Benowitz). NY DOS biennial filing 6/25/2025 confirms continuing active status. SAFER snapshot reports 3 injury crashes in past 24 months.

name: Domino Bus Inc
notes: No confident FMCSA match. SAFER keyword search for 'DOMINO BUS' returned no records; broader 'DOMINO' search returned only freight/oil carriers (Domino Fuel, Domino Oil, Domino Snacks, Domino Transport) - none in Staten Island. DIMINO BUS SERVICE OF NY INC (USDOT 3930096) is at Howard Beach NY, not Staten Island, and is a different entity. Likely Domino Bus Inc operates intrastate without USDOT, or files under a different legal name. No matching NY DOS entity surfaced in available searches. Recommend direct lookup at apps.dos.ny.gov for confirmation.

name: Ribblett School Bus Line
registry_source: Third-party business directories (Buzzfile, Manta, hub.biz) reporting PA incorporation 1998; PA DOS direct search blocked
notes: No FMCSA SAFER match for RIBBLETT, RIBBLET, or RIBBLET CORP. Likely intrastate-only school bus operator below USDOT threshold or registered under a different legal name. Third-party sources confirm Ribblett (a.k.a. Ribblet Corp / Ribblett School Bus Line) at 1403 Frankstown Rd, Johnstown, PA 15902; ~5 employees, ~$242K annual revenue, incorporated in PA in 1998, Albin Ribblett as President, phone 814-539-8322. PA Secretary of State direct search returned 403/TLS errors so inc_date is from secondary sources.

name: Mariner's Anchor Bus Svc
notes: No FMCSA SAFER match for MARINERS ANCHOR, MARINER ANCHOR, or ANCHOR BUS in Georgia. The only MARINERS carriers in SAFER are in NH, OK, NY, NC (none Georgia). Georgia eCorp Secretary of State direct search blocked (403). No third-party listings surfaced for a school-bus business at 677 Bo Bo Banks Rd, Grantville GA 30220. Address is in Coweta County. Two other transport carriers operate on Bo Bo Banks Rd (Running Hard Transportation #806264 at 871 Bobo Banks Rd; KLEA Transportation #2296648 at 243 Bo Bo Banks Rd) but neither matches the name. Likely small intrastate operator with no USDOT; entity may be unregistered as a corporation or operated under owner's personal name.

name: Chela School Bus Svc LLC
registry_source: FL Sunbiz - Florida Division of Corporations, document number L23000108820, FEI/EIN 92-2435035
notes: FL Sunbiz: Chela School Bus Service LLC (doc L23000108820) registered 3/1/2023 as FL LLC, status Active, principal/mailing address 7050 SW 19th St, Miami FL 33155, Manager and Registered Agent Graciela Nichols, FEI 92-2435035. Annual reports filed 6/26/2024 and 3/4/2025; LC amendment 4/25/2023. No FMCSA SAFER match for CHELA SCHOOL or CHELA SCHOOL BUS - SAFER results for 'CHELA' are all out-of-state freight/grill/trucking carriers in NJ/IL/WA/MN/CO/TN/CA. Likely intrastate-only school bus operator below the USDOT requirement (FL school buses typically operate under FL DOE / Miami-Dade County private school bus permit rather than USDOT). Note: An entity 'Chela Nichols School Bus Service Inc' is referenced on allbiz.com indicating Graciela Nichols may have a predecessor entity, but Sunbiz primary record is the 2023 LLC.
